type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Production rate and hours of operation decreased for both furnaces (MHF1 and MHF2) compared to 2023.  Additionally, year-to-year variation in emissions is introduced with annual testing conducted on each stack source.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: TPM emissions for 2024 are near the threshold and since they have been reported in previous year, they are being reported voluntarily.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Production rate and hours of operation decreased for both furnaces (MHF1 and MHF2) compared to 2023.  Additionally, year-to-year variation in emissions is introduced with annual testing conducted on each stack source. Fugitive emissions decreased from ore handling and storage, in part due to the year-to-year variation of meteorological conditions that are used to calculate emissions.  Less than 10,000 vehicle kilometers travelled at the facility and road dust was not included in 2024.
